title: deschampsia cespitosa var. pungens
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa var. pungens, also known as needle grass or pungent hair grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
